tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Half of my blood is Cain's blood[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
Half of my blood is A-bel's[/tab]

One eye looks to Heaven
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]CM7[/ch]
One eye looks for trouble[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab]                              [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Sweet mother, she sang in the Sunday choir[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
On her head was a halo, she spoke brimstone and fire[/tab]

Daddy lived by the bottle, Daddy died by the barn
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]CM7[/ch]
Well, he froze one night, Mama said "Serves him right"[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bsus4[/ch]               [ch]B7[/ch]
"The devil can keep him warm"[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Half of my blood is Cain's blood[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
Half of my blood is A-bel's[/tab]

One eye looks to Heaven
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]CM7[/ch]
One eye looks for trouble[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]                               [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]CM7[/ch]
Guess I always saw myself as a simple man[/tab]
[tab]                                        [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
But there's a man in the mirror I don't understand[/tab]

Every day I fight it, but I know down deep
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]CM7[/ch]
It's the secrets I've been keeping[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bsus4[/ch]              [ch]B7[/ch]
Rising from their sleep[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Half of my blood is Cain's blood[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
Half of my blood is A-bel's[/tab]

One eye looks to Heaven
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]
One eye looks for trouble[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]N.C.                  [ch]D[/ch]                                  [ch]Em[/ch]
There's an angel and a devil playing tug of war with my soul (Half of my blood is Cain's blood)[/tab]
[tab]                                                            [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
The battle rages on each and every day (Half of my blood is A-bel's)[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]                                  [ch]Em[/ch]
It's all I can do just to try to maintain control (Half of my blood is Cain's Blood)[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]Bsus4[/ch]                      [ch]B7[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]CM7[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]CM7[/ch] [ch]Bsus4[/ch] [ch]B7[/ch]
My one and only hope (One and only hope) is to my knees and pray[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Half of my blood is Cain's blood[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
Half of my blood is A-bel's[/tab]

One eye looks to Heaven
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]
One eye looks for trouble[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Half of my blood is Cain's blood[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
Half of my blood is A-bel's[/tab]

Half of my blood (Half of my blood)
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Half of my blood (Half of my blood)...[/tab]
